payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: They are the worst. You went and had a discussion at the Estate Sybaritic with Ophelia Mardun, of whom you were sent by The Gentleman to interface with and do a deed for her a little over two weeks ago. There it seemed that the intent of your job placed here in this city has aligned with your current goal of freeing your friends and seeking vengeance against the Iron Shepherds, as they currently work for a competitive family to the Mardun house, and in response to them destroying parts of the trade route that the Mardun family enjoys through the center and southern sides of the empire, they wish you to instill damage upon their traders as well, by eliminating the Iron Shepherds. You were given some ideas as to where you might find some help, you gathered your things, made your way north into the seemingly corrupted and haunted Savalierwood, to seek information about these Iron Shepherds and where they are. You narrowly avoided two large, immensely mutated, bone-spurred bear creatures. You sought out and cased the exterior of the Sour Nest, which is the fortress that was given to the Iron Shepherds by the family that pays them and keeps them in their employ. You decided to send your new druid friend, Nila, in the form of a small mouse, over the wall, delivery via owl. She snuck through some portions of the fortress to gather intel, and to get an idea of where you were going and what may reside within. A few close calls, and some discovery of what can be expected within the interior, you made your way back, safely, to join your friends.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: We've got some other fun surprises for folks that are coming, too. Anyway, much love, I think it's time--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, so tense.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That we dive into tonight's episode of Critical Role. [click, TV static] [groovy Critical Role theme]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Welcome back, everyone. Last we left off, The Mighty Nein, who had acquired two new allies in Keg, the dwarven fighter, and Nila, the firbolg druid, had made their way to the city of Shadycreek Run. After making your way through the town, spending an evening staying at the Landlocked Lady, and getting some information about where to find info about your quarry, and where your friends may have been taken to after they were captured by the Iron Shepherds, a traveling slavers crew.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: That's fair. It takes you a few minutes and you find a couple of softer pieces of branch and vine that have fallen to the corruption. It's interesting; you touch them and they're supple like vines, but they're gray and freezing to the touch. It's a very weird, unnatural feeling, but it seems supple.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: How tall are the gates?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The areas where the fence has been pushed in is between five to six feet in places, areas where it seems to be pushed down lower to about four to even three and a half.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Your friend's coat? I know it's maybe not--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You mean the tapestry?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: The tapestry. I know it might hurt it, but if we drape it over--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We buried him with it.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that's right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: But that's a good idea.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: You want to go back? I could try to hack at it with my axe.

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: Could an animal jump over it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. You guys could attempt to climb and leap over. Elements of it are thorned and jagged.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: This is what I used to do to hop fences back in the day. I look for a few broken-down branches that might be my height.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an investigation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: A handful.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We are going on a witch hunt. We can't go over it, we can't go under it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Ten.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Each of you make your way over this element of the forest, continuing on past the next two boundaries, eventually making your way into the central area of the Blooming Grove. The term now striking a bell as you look around and can see these beautiful flowers as the sun rays hit and pass. It's like the color flares up once the light hits it and then seems to gray as it passes on. You now stand, temperature much warmer, and there's just that stone structure ahead.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm coming!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Careful.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm just going to dash over.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're just going to dash over? Make an acrobatics check.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That was 12 plus... 19.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Caleb has shown areas, as he passed over, where you can safely climb. The rest of you don't need to make checks. Nott ignores this entirely and goes leaping and flipping and attempting to make her way over. The actual fence bends slightly at the impact of foot, the iron beneath having wilted due to long-form rust and whatever perpetual weight has been placed upon it from this land attempting to reclaim it from underneath. Nott leaps, double flip in the air, lands on the opposite side, skids a bit as your feet hit a slight bit of the icy floor, but you manage to catch yourself, no issue.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Keg holds up a ten.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Looking through, there are a few languages that come through, most of them are elven and they are very old. Some of them appear to be 100, 200, 400-500 years old. Whatever individuals or families or bloodlines have been interred in this space have been placed here for a very long time, until recently.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Keg holds up a ten.

It's like the color flares up once the light hits it and then seems to gray as it passes on. You now stand, temperature much warmer, and there's just that stone structure ahead.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: How far away is the structure?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: From where you're standing on the interior of it, about 40 or so feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: On the tombstones that are around, do I recognize any of the language, or can I tell how old some of these gravesites are?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an investigation check.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You do see one that appears to be maybe about ten years old. Very faint elements of wear and tear.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: How far away is the structure?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: From where you're standing on the interior of it, about 40 or so feet.

Whatever individuals or families or bloodlines have been interred in this space have been placed here for a very long time, until recently.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Until recently, okay.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It'll add an hour or so to go into Shadycreek. Essentially this is Shadycreek Run at the bottom of the forest and you've traveled, from your perspective, far northwest to get to the area where you met Caduceus. You're now heading back down and the Sour Nest is on the northeastern side of the city, just outside of it, so you have to scoot and ricochet off.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Well, did we decide what we're doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I think we were going to go straight there.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: We're going straight to the Shepherds?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's on the way.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We didn't really discuss; we got distracted.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's true. Are you guys heading back to Shadycreek, or are you heading straight to the Sour Nest?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is it on the way?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's on the way. I say we at least stop by and scout it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: If it's more or less on the way then yeah, we can at least swing by.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay, so you head straight to The Sour Nest? All right. Over the next couple of hours, you make your way, scooting as opposed to the more southern direction you were traveling, heading eastward. Carefully making your way on the outskirts of the northern side of North Clover of Shadycreek Run, I need you all to make stealth checks.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Are you describing a date right now?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The insertion goes well, maybe we go steady.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I don't know what any of that means.

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: You will get used to it. I just laugh along now.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Look, they're your people, so I'll leave it to you guys, but I don't love the odds.

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: I know because of your abilities, if we can draw more of them outside, we will stand a better chance. We will have more power than you had last time.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Let's go to the house.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We're just going to watch.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We're going to see what it's like at night so if we have to come back tomorrow night, we'll know what to expect. Are there more guards at night? We don't know, they could have six more dudes who come up there at night.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Let's go. We're wasting time just talking.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We'll just look.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We'll go look.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Even still, you approach the outskirts of The Sour Nest. The clouds of the night are broken here and there, the very darkened night occasionally broken by the errant moonbeam that manages to sweep through the open grove where this fortress was built. The canopy itself cleared out, leaving it open for the occasional peek of white through the clouds. The same perimeter wall you see being slowly trained across by two guards dressed in the same hooded attire as those that you previously saw. As you saw as well bringing the three carts northward from the Glory Run Road. As you begin to approach, Keg, unfortunately, manages to step on a hornet's nest. It crunches under your foot, and, for a brief second, you inhale very sharply knowing this familiar sound-- This is not the first hornet's nest you've stepped into. Thankfully, a moment passes, no hornets. It was abandoned and had fallen from a tree. However, you do hear a voice on the wall say, "Hello?"

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Do I know if Lorenzo is a loyal person, like would he give or would he just let someone die if they got taken?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Best that you can tell, he's not a "leave no man behind" type individual.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: He isn't?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He is not.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: But he is a vengeful type of individual?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He's definitely a fan of an eye for an eye.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: If it goes south, and we manage to kill one of them, he might chase us.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: True.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Or maybe not.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Or maybe not. It could be a backup.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No, it's good.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's go.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh, stealth checks, right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Stealth checks.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: First stealth check. Where's my stealth? Seven.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Seven.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: These are such bad stealth checks.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Thanks to you speaking with nature, I am ignoring one of the lowest stealth rolls.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Only one?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay. You guys wait an hour to get into position.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Rescue the people in the basement.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: So you've got to get in and out of the basement. That seems to be the conversation then, is getting in and out of the basement. I'm sure, inevitably, you're going to kill a whole bunch of people in the process of that, but as long as you're focused on where you're going and what you're doing, that may help with this wanton violence against Phil, who I'm sure is a terrible person. He shot an owl.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Phil's friend did.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: He thought it was funny, though, so he's still a dick.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No, that ain't funny.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right, let's split up, take these guys out.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No, it's too early. We need to wait.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Jesus!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's 10 35 at night. We need to wait until they're asleep.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Call it 10 37 at this point.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We wait an hour and get into position.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You guys can take a short rest.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Until the next shift change. I could use a short rest anyway.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Get on different sides of the facility?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I think so.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, but Keg, you stay here.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: And do what?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: With two other people. We're splitting up so we can take them both out at the same time.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you are just waiting until some of us are able to silently take out these people on the wall. Then we buy ourselves a little time while you can clink and clunk as we get closer.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: (laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's good that you find levity in the situation. Then we go into the inside of this wall and take the next step.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: So it's not three and three, it's three and two.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, it's two groups, and you move less right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Fair.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I take a short rest?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Shortly after midnight, you watch as two figures ascend from the inside of the wall climbing up different ladders that mark the entrance and exit. They both interface in a brief conversation, hushed voices, and then relieve the two previous guards, who then descend down on the inside of the courtyard via those same ladders and disappear into The Sour Nest fortress. So there has been a guard changeover now. It's past midnight, pushing one in the morning. What would you like to do?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No. No windows in the bottom floor. There is a front double door, and there is a single door in the back that you know leads into a kitchen.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Go Charlotte, go! You're radiant!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: He has three hit points, so I think he's actually a bigger spider than the one you're imagining. See, he's right there. He's very big.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: How big is that spider?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's a pretty big spider.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's three hit points worth of spider.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That looks like a three hit point spider.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Somebody could step on it and he could still go.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's a four or five hitter.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Get Brian Foster in here with his ping pong racket.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's arguably terrifying, I'll give it to you. I was a little wrong, just a little.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I put it on Beau's shoulder.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm not terrified of it, I'm just saying it could be terrifying. Hi, Frumpkin.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Shortly after midnight, you watch as two figures ascend from the inside of the wall climbing up different ladders that mark the entrance and exit. They both interface in a brief conversation, hushed voices, and then relieve the two previous guards, who then descend down on the inside of the courtyard via those same ladders and disappear into The Sour Nest fortress. So there has been a guard changeover now. It's past midnight, pushing one in the morning. What would you like to do?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No. No windows in the bottom floor. There is a front double door, and there is a single door in the back that you know leads into a kitchen.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Go Charlotte, go! You're radiant!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: He has three hit points, so I think he's actually a bigger spider than the one you're imagining. See, he's right there. He's very big.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: How big is that spider?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's a pretty big spider.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's three hit points worth of spider.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That looks like a three hit point spider.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Somebody could step on it and he could still go.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's a four or five hitter.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Get Brian Foster in here with his ping pong racket.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's arguably terrifying, I'll give it to you. I was a little wrong, just a little.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I put it on Beau's shoulder.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm not terrified of it, I'm just saying it could be terrifying. Hi, Frumpkin.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: About a minute passes before Beauregard pulls back away, this strange trance passing over her.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Do you have kids?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Why are you badgering him with questions?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, he's a new friend and I talk when I'm nervous.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Why don't you let him think and answer questions one at a time?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You're right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Sure, well, I'm learning from-- I don't know who, actually. None of us are good at this. Nila, I guess.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Nila is really good at this; she's great.

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: What am I good at?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I don't know I can only hear muffles. Choice words. I think they're talking about you, though.

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: It's okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I pull the haversack off and say  I have a decent idea, anyway. I think that you should use this.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Much like how you spend a moment with your smell bag, you watch as Beauregard seems to focus into this strange, vibrant pink satchel or shoulder bag that Caleb has been carrying.

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: What is inside?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It's a long rest to come back.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I want to wait until right after he passes, and then I want to do some ninja stuff.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Are you just sipping tea?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yep.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: First, I need you to make a stealth check because you're having to move right up against the wall. This is a ten-foot clearing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I do.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Use the dodeca if you need to.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's true.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Both of you guys roll stealth checks.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Mmm.

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: Doesn't she get a plus ten to the stealth?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It is a plus ten to stealth check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Then that gives me a 20 total. Okay, 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit, how did I get the same thing? Look.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I cursed you!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You need to stealth too?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Luck, you have luck still.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What's your total?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Does that apply to her, the Pass without a Trace?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: But you have a luck left.

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: I have two luck points left, but I feel like--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, you have one because you used one last game.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: But we short rested, didn't we?

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: Oh, we rested.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Rolled a six on his perception. Would you both make your attack rolls, please? Because you are unseen, you have advantage on the attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Both of you guys roll stealth checks.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Mmm.

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: Doesn't she get a plus ten to the stealth?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It is a plus ten to stealth check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Then that gives me a 20 total. Okay, 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit, how did I get the same thing? Look.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I cursed you!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You need to stealth too?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Luck, you have luck still.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What's your total?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Does that apply to her, the Pass without a Trace?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: But you have a luck left.

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: I have two luck points left, but I feel like--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, you have one because you used one last game.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: But we short rested, didn't we?

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: Oh, we rested.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's a long rest to come back.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You got one left.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Farts.

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: I think I need to hold that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So 15 and 20? You're throwing a javelin and you're firing.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You both run up to the wall. You go ahead and hoist up, hanging on the edge right there. Walks past, doesn't seem to have noticed the both of you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: Woo!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You manage to pilfer about 62 gold pieces.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Easy enough to do.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I like this guy.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's cool, I haven't done this.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you give the Deuce your nod, you watch as his form actually shifts smaller and matches the shape of the previous guard.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Mr. Clay!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Cool trick!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Finishing your Detect Magic, you do not detect anything magical of the outer gate. It is locked.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Are we going in together? Should we do back entrance/front entrance?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I can unlock the front entrance for you guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I take my wire and I say  Nott are you on the ground still? Can you meet me at the front gates quietly?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, give us a minute. I am going to rifle through the dude's pockets and go through the guy we just killed's stuff.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Make an investigation check, because you're doing this quickly.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 15? Not too bad.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do we want to go front entrance/back entrance?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: 16, okay. You find 22 gold pieces.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You manage to pilfer about 62 gold pieces.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Why is he so rich?!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Because you caught him at the moment outside of the town and he had his money on him.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: But does he have anything else useful, like keys?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No keys on him, no.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, make sure we get the gold out of our dude's pockets, you're right there on the ground.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, cool. Anything else?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He felt safe on that wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Anything else useful? No.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The crossbow that he had seems to have snapped in the process of his body being yanked from the top of the wall. His armor is standard leather armor.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, great.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Is there anything on the dude's armor that I put on?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You didn't stop to check, you're already up on the wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: I can check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: If you want to. Make an investigation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: 17, what do I add?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Investigation.

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: Minus one.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right. Going past the barrel pile where you had previously made your way in and out via owl the previous day. As you guys scoot past, you hear the front door of the facility (thudding) (creaking). It opens ever so faintly to the inside, and a figure peers out, having apparently heard something.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I think it's as long as they're within 30 feet, it's like a field and you can say yea or nay. That's my view.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It doesn't say at the moment of casting you have to select; just that for the duration you choose. So, my interpretation, I would allow someone to step into the radius, and you could then choose.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so we know better. We know you don't have to cast it.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'll snuggle up to Nila.

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: I choose Keg.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's tippy-toe around the back door.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, let's go!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, everyone who's now making their way around the back, make another stealth check.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Am I at disadvantage now? Still?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're still at disadvantage, because you still have your armor.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: So two plus ten plus five. 17.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I miss Vax so much.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Plus ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Plus ten, whatever it is.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You guys begin to head around this direction?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right, roll initiative, you guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Inside-- tickle, right.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Tickle means right.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Nothing, left. Liam eats farts. I'm ready.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You've got it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Got it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Tickle means right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I do another check to see if I see any movement upstairs.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're still keeping tabs on it. I'm not going to have you roll just for consistently staring.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I just want to make sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, you do see a shadow pass by the door-- by the window.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: By the window.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I cast Mage Hand just in case.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. What do you do?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I will go through and wait for a tickle.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: My hand is on Keg's shoulder in case things go to shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: To the right is a hallway, an open entrance that goes into a pantry or storage room. To the left is a door that leads beyond the kitchen.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Tickle means right; left is nothing.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is there a tickle?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I will go straight.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're at a door.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I will try the door.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It opens, it's not locked.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Tickle, tickle.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You feel a tickle.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I turn right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a stealth check, please, because you're now passing within ear shot of--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's a one!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: No!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. As you turn the corner, part of your cloak seems to have caught the edge of one of the pots that was layered on the table right here. As you pull through, pots start clattering. You guys watch as this whole stack of pots start pulling off into the kitchen. The door here swings open and both of these figures come rushing in. "Hey, what the hell!" They both pull out blades.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I drop it. We're in, go! I walk into the building.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: (counting) That puts you right there. That ends your go. It is now Clay's turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh Jesus. I will bonus action disengage, and run through the door that the spider told me to go through.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Which one?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The closed one.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, you go to that door. It's locked.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Locked? Great, I'll go through the other door.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can use your action to try and fast pick it, if you like. It's up to you. Because you can do that as a rogue.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Sure, I'll do that. I'll fast pick.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Pick fast. 12.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 12? It holds tight.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Sure. I have any more movement?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You have currently 20 feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I will run into the next room, as far as I can get.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Go for it. Swing for the attack. Actually, you could, if you wanted to, I'll allow you to move in to flank with Keg. That'll give you advantage on the attack roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that's right, they had the weapons. Shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: However, that's her turn. That brings us to Nila. You're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I want to get to the trapdoor.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What do you do, mom?

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: Yes. I would like to move. Oh wait, he's not dead yet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He is not. You can just barely see another individual who appears to be joining the fray across the way. One of the slavers that is responsible for taking your family.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Fucking slavers.

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I'd like to move forward and finish off Phil.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: Sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Mother's vengeance. Fuck you, Phil!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Are you going Poison Spray, or you going--

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to use the shillelagh.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You step in--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (singing) I can feel it coming in the air tonight.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (synth drums)

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: This is for my son, Asar!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Go for it. Swing for the attack. Actually, you could, if you wanted to, I'll allow you to move in to flank with Keg. That'll give you advantage on the attack roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that's right, they had the weapons. Shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: However, that's her turn. That brings us to Nila. You're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I want to get to the trapdoor.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What do you do, mom?

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: Yes. I would like to move. Oh wait, he's not dead yet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He is not. You can just barely see another individual who appears to be joining the fray across the way. One of the slavers that is responsible for taking your family.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Fucking slavers.

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I'd like to move forward and finish off Phil.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: Sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Mother's vengeance. Fuck you, Phil!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Are you going Poison Spray, or you going--

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to use the shillelagh.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You step in--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (singing) I can feel it coming in the air tonight.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (synth drums)

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: This is for my son, Asar!

payload.raw_text: For the next minute, yes.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: I'm being a nerd. Have fun!

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns_last5.text: Yes, okay. I place my Bear Spirit Totem.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Okay, so you're taking the totem.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns_last5.text: This will protect anyone who comes within 30 feet of it.

payload.raw_text: So ten temporary hit points to Caleb, Nila, Nott, and Beau for the next minute.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: When the spirit appears, so you guys do not get it, unfortunately.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns_last5.text: Okay, so you're still fucked. Goddamn it.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: 14? Okay. You manage to find about 38 gold pieces in the pouch that she keeps on her side. You find another pouch that is a bunch of dried meats that have been salted and smoked, like a jerky. You also find another pack that has teeth in it. Just a collection of teeth. Different sizes, different ages.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Nott, wait for me.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: 12 points to you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Come, quickly!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I follow too.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Everyone stand back! Caleb's going to do a thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to watch this front door and make sure no one else comes down the steps.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Over here?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No, here.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (stammering) Get the sword!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh, the sword? I'll grab the sword, then.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, get the sword. Sword in the haversack.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Grab the sword. You pull the sheath off her back and slip it in the haversack.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Anything else worth checking?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Attune to the sword.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No, I'm putting it in the haversack.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Before I leave, could I investigate--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's Yasha's sword.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: --to see if I see anything else worth taking?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: If you'd like to. It takes a moment for you to rifle through her stuff.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'll do that. What is that check?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Investigation.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: That's a 14.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay, so you have one minute before that spell goes away.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. What's everybody else doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The gate's open.

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: I want to go down.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I feel like I want to stay with Caleb, in case.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so Keg is staying up with Caleb.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Is that cool with you, Caleb?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll go with you, Nila.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I can't hear anything.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nila, you head down.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Well, I'm going to stand behind you, in case.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that's great.

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: Come join us.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'll come down with you, that's fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Do I feel you next to me?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, maybe I'll put my hand on you?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Do I? If I feel the dwarf next to me, I would use a free hand to jam some licorice back into my mouth and start chewing furiously, anxiously. I'm so scared of everything. And cast Haste again, into the dwarf.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Tight.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: That puts it over 20. Both of you together (strains), and one of the bars comes off on one side. He gets in quickly and puts his shoulder in and pushes against the other, and that bends off to the side, leaving just enough room for him to push through. It takes a minute and you're helping him and grabbing his elbow, and the two of your together-- You feel something pop in his shoulder, but it's just enough to get his body to wedge out of the space, and he comes back out of it and embraces you-- the other arm limply hanging at one side, but he takes you in his hand. He looks down at his son and looks over at the rest of you, tired. Still, amongst the trauma he has suffered, there is a pride and a silent strength to him-- very much similar to that you've seen in Nila. "I do not know by what grace you've come to us, but thank you."

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: It's okay, they're safe. They came to help. Can you get out?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Help me."

preceding_turns.speaker: SUMALEE
preceding_turns.text: How? Tell me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He stands up in the cage; his hunched form is crammed in by this cage that was not designed for his firbolg body. Nevertheless, he reaches out and grabs the bars where you had started. "On three: one, two, three-- (strains)." He's going to go ahead and make a strength check with advantage. That's a natural 17... and a natural 19! I love it when it works for the narrative! (laughing)
